notes: Bumped after v0.92.0..v0.93.0 sweep (release 0.93.0). Added features/security.mdx 'Disk Encryption & Recovery Keys' section: Encryption page (method/status/TPM + escrow-state filter Key escrowed/missing), device Security tab Recovery Keys panel (Collect now / Rotate key / Reveal, audited, encrypted at rest), and the /security/encryption/devices/:deviceId/recovery-keys[/:keyId/reveal|/collect|/rotate] API (#2021). No new required env vars; one migration (device_recovery_keys + recovery_key_access_events, new tables only). DEFERRED to next sweep (refinements to already-documented areas, lower priority): per-device Vulnerabilities tab reshape #2272 (posture header + software groups + GET /vulnerabilities/devices/:deviceId/software; vulnerability-management.mdx currently documents the v0.92.0 fleet queue only); software single-step Add Package + installer URL variables + built-in EDR readiness #2260; quote image-from-URL #2264 (quotes.mdx); advisory Polish-with-AI fact-guard #2265; native remote-session consent #2254 (remote-access).
